global_summary.note: MAJOR UPDATE: OpenAI official disclosure (Mar 31, 2026) — 'APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute' = 21.6T/day API-only. Combined with 2.5B consumer prompts/day, total revised from 32T → 40T (+25%). This cascades global total from 235T → 245T. Google Gemini reconfirmed 10B+ tokens/min via API (Apr 1 week). Anthropic subscription crisis (Apr 1-4) + third-party tool cutoff signals compute strain from extreme demand growth. $25B+ ARR.

token_gdp.note: Blended price per vendor region. US ~$1.50/M tokens, EU ~$1.20/M, CN ~$0.10/M.
token_gdp.key_insight: China generates 58% of global tokens but only 9% of Token GDP. US generates 35% of tokens but 81% of Token GDP. Pricing gap: 15x. OpenAI's official 15B tokens/min API disclosure (Mar 31) upgrades US volume significantly. Doubao accounts for 49% of global token volume.

key_stats.344x_headline: A US user generates 394× more AI tokens per day than an Indian user
key_stats.great_divergence: China: 58% of tokens, 9% of Token GDP. US: 35% of tokens, 81% of Token GDP.
key_stats.doubao_note: Doubao accounts for 49% of global token volume as of Apr 2026 (share dips from 51% as OpenAI official API data upgrades US volume)
key_stats.openai_api_milestone: OpenAI APIs crossed 15 billion tokens/minute (Mar 31, 2026) — official disclosure in $122B funding announcement

vendors.name: Doubao (ByteDance)
vendors.source: OFFICIAL: Volcengine disclosure at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026) — 120T/day confirmed by ByteDance. Reported by Xinzhiyuan (新智元). 4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo applied.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate from Volcano Engine Q3 2025 disclosure
OFFICIAL DISCLOSURE: Volcengine announced 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026). Source: Xinzhiyuan report. Previous estimate 69.2T was extrapolation — actual is +73% higher.
4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo from Apr 1 official baseline of 120T. No new hard data this week. ByteDance continues aggressive agentic tool expansion.

vendors.name: Google Gemini (All Surfaces)
vendors.source: RECONFIRMED: Sundar Pichai (Apr 1, 2026 week) — 'Gemini models now process over 10 billion tokens per minute via API' = 14.4T/day API-only. Identical to Feb 4 disclosure. All Surfaces estimate: 57T. Gemma 4 launched Apr 1 (new open model, accelerant for developer usage). Google Cloud revenue +48% YoY (Alphabet Q1 2026).
vendors.note: All Surfaces = Search AI Overviews + Gemini App (750M MAU) + Workspace + Cloud API. HARD DATA: Pichai confirmed 10B+ tokens/min via direct API (both Feb 4 and Apr 1 disclosures). All Surfaces estimated 57T. Gemma 4 launch (Apr 1) + Gemini API Docs MCP adds developer volume. Google Cloud +48% YoY.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate using Q4 2025 API-only metric
ANCHORED: Pichai Q4 2025 earnings (Feb 4) confirmed 10B tokens/min API = 14.4T/day. All Surfaces estimated 55T.

FRESH RECONFIRMATION: Pichai reaffirmed 'over 10 billion tokens per minute via API' (Apr 1 week, Alphabet Q1 context). Gemma 4 launched Apr 1 — 'most capable open models to date' with agentic focus + Gemini API Docs MCP for developers. Google Cloud revenue +48% YoY. 4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo: 55T→57T.

vendors.name: OpenAI (ChatGPT + API)
vendors.source: OFFICIAL: openai.com $122B funding announcement (Mar 31, 2026) — 'Our APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute' = 21.6T/day API-only. Plus consumer ChatGPT: 900M WAU, 2.5B prompts/day, 50M subscribers. $2B/month revenue ($24B ARR). Enterprise >40% of revenue. Codex serves 2M+ developers.
vendors.note: HARD DATA: Official openai.com statement confirms 15B tokens/min = 21.6T/day for APIs/Codex/enterprise. Consumer ChatGPT (2.5B prompts/day × ~8K avg tokens) adds ~20T/day. Conservative total 40T (overlap-adjusted). Previous 32T was based on consumer-side back-calc alone — the new API figure confirms higher enterprise volume. Revenue: $24B ARR ($2B/mo). Enterprise now >40% of revenue, on track to equal consumer by end 2026.

revision_history.reason: $24B ARR confirmed. Conservative 32T held pending direct token throughput.

OFFICIAL HARD DATA: openai.com $122B raise announcement (Mar 31) explicitly states 'Our APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute' = 21.6T/day API/Codex/enterprise. Combined with consumer ChatGPT (2.5B prompts/day × ~8K tokens ≈ 20T) and overlap correction, conservative total: 40T. Previous 32T was consumer-side estimate only. Confidence upgraded medium-high → high. Source: https://openai.com/index/accelerating-the-next-phase-ai/

vendors.name: Claude (Anthropic)
vendors.source: DEMAND SIGNALS: Claude Code subscription crisis (Apr 1, 2026) — Anthropic admits users hitting limits 'way faster than expected' (DevClass Apr 1). Anthropic cut off third-party tools (OpenClaw etc.) from subscriptions Apr 4, citing compute strain. $25B+ ARR (SemiAnalysis Apr 1). $19B ARR confirmed end-Feb (Yahoo Finance Mar 4 / Forbes Mar 25). Claude Code $2.5B ARR.
vendors.note: Multiple demand signals this week: (1) Claude Code users exhausting quotas at unprecedented rate — cache bugs inflating costs 10-20x, (2) Anthropic cut off third-party tool subscriptions Apr 4 due to compute strain ('third party services are not optimized... hard to do sustainably'), (3) $25B+ ARR per SemiAnalysis Apr 1. ARR back-calc at $3/M: $25B/3/365 = 22.8T/day theoretical max. Conservative 15T held. The subscription crisis + infrastructure strain signals actual usage is at the high end of estimates.

revision_history.reason: ARR resolved: $9B→$14B→$19B→$25B+ timeline. Multiple corroborating sources. Conservative 14.6T held.

DEMAND SIGNALS: Claude Code subscription crisis (DevClass Apr 1) — users hitting limits 'way faster than expected', cache bugs inflating costs 10-20×, Anthropic imposed 5h peak-hour session limits. Anthropic cut off OpenClaw + third-party tools from subscriptions Apr 4 due to compute strain (Boris Cherny: 'our subscriptions weren't built for the usage patterns of these third-party tools'). $25B+ ARR (SemiAnalysis Apr 1). All signals point to demand exceeding capacity. Conservative 4-day extrapolation at 18%/mo: 14.6→15.0T.

vendors.name: DeepSeek
vendors.source: 130M MAU by early 2026 (BusinessOfApps). V4 Lite (runs on Huawei chips, The Information Apr 2026). 0.2% US chatbot market share. No direct token throughput disclosure.
vendors.note: V4 Lite confirmed to run on Huawei chips (The Information, Apr 2026) — signals continued China infrastructure independence. 130M MAU. No official token throughput data. Value nudged to 8.2T.

revision_history.reason: 130M MAU by early 2026. V4 Lite launched Mar 2026. Still no direct token throughput. Value held.
4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo. DeepSeek V4 Lite to run on Huawei chips (The Information). No new token volume data.

vendors.name: Azure OpenAI Service
vendors.source: Microsoft Copilot $5.4B ARR, 15M paid seats, 33M active users. GitHub Copilot 4.7M paid subs. Azure AI revenue +157% YoY (Jan 2026 earnings).

revision_history.reason: Microsoft Copilot $5.4B ARR, Azure AI +157% YoY. Value held at 8T.
4-day extrapolation at 10%/mo. No new hard data this week.

vendors.name: Qwen (Alibaba Cloud)
vendors.source: China enterprise AI 37T tokens/day H2 2025, Qwen #1 market share (CNR Feb 24, 2026). OpenRouter global #4 with 10.4% share. Qwen3.5-Plus (397B params) + Qwen3-Max-Thinking (1T+ params).

revision_history.reason: Qwen #1 CN enterprise share of 37T/day. Qwen3.5-Plus + Qwen3-Max-Thinking launched.

vendors.name: Hunyuan (Tencent)
vendors.source: Yuanbao DAU 50M peak (Spring Festival 2026). Dual-model (Hunyuan + DeepSeek). 900 internal Tencent apps. Low retention vs Doubao/Qwen (industry consensus).

revision_history.reason: Multiple CN sources confirm 50M DAU peak. Low retention per industry analysis. Confidence upgraded very-low→low.

vendors.name: ERNIE (Baidu)
vendors.source: Ernie 5.0 launched Jan 2026 (SCMP), 200M MAU. Q2 2024: 1T tokens/day, 600M API calls/day. Feb 2025: 16.5B daily API calls. Ernie 4.5 open-source (Apache 2.0).

revision_history.reason: Ernie 5.0 200M MAU. Ernie 4.5 open-sourced. Value held at 1.72T.

vendors.source: $100M ARR (technews.tw Mar 31). $18B valuation. 20 days revenue > 2025 full year. OpenRouter Feb 2026: K2.5 consumed 4.02T tokens/month = 0.134T/day on OpenRouter alone.

revision_history.reason: MAJOR REVISION: OpenRouter Feb data 4.02T/month = 0.134T/day on OpenRouter alone. $100M ARR. Conservative 1.5T total estimate.

correction_log.reason: OFFICIAL HARD DATA: openai.com $122B raise announcement (Mar 31, 2026) explicitly states 'Our APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute' = 21.6T/day API/Codex/enterprise. Previous 32T was based on consumer-side 2.5B prompts/day estimate alone. New: API(21.6T) + Consumer(~20T overlap-adjusted) = 40T conservative. Source: https://openai.com/index/accelerating-the-next-phase-ai/

Pichai reconfirmed 'over 10 billion tokens per minute via API' this week (Apr 1 context, Alphabet Q1). Gemma 4 launched Apr 1. Google Cloud +48% YoY. 4-day extrapolation at 8%/mo + fresh reconfirmation data point.

Demand signals: subscription crisis (Apr 1) users hitting limits way faster than expected; Anthropic cut off OpenClaw/third-party tools Apr 4 citing compute strain; $25B+ ARR (SemiAnalysis Apr 1). 4-day extrapolation at 18%/mo + demand signal upgrade.

Cascade from OpenAI official 15B tokens/min disclosure (+8T), Gemini reconfirmation (+2T), Claude demand signals (+0.4T), minor vendor extrapolations. US share rises 34%→35%, China share dips 61%→58% as US volume upgraded with hard data.
US per-capita update: 87T/335M = 259.7K tokens/person. 259.7K/0.66K = 394×. Doubao share: 120T/245T = 49% (down from 51% as OpenAI/Gemini volumes upgraded with hard data).

OFFICIAL DISCLOSURE: Volcengine announced 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026). Reported by Xinzhiyuan. Previous estimate was extrapolated from Jan 2026 baseline — actual is +73% higher. Source: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/uc6NWmhNBzmsChN9xJdz_w
Cascade from Doubao official 120T disclosure. China now 61% of global volume. Doubao alone = 51% of global total.
